# Changelog

## [v0.2.0](https://github.com/Lruihao/vue-route-bridge/compare/v0.1.0...v0.2.0 "2026-07-03")

Add a transform option to createRouterSync that allows modifying
the received route snapshot before syncing to the parent router.

### :tada: New Features

- **Child**: Add transform hook for route snapshot customization [`b1cadb6`](https://github.com/Lruihao/vue-route-bridge/commit/b1cadb6a79448d56dd7c5fd7bafd7ab1c3b38baa) by @Lruihao
- **Parent**: Add transform hook to createRouterSync [`36f858d`](https://github.com/Lruihao/vue-route-bridge/commit/36f858da7c07d0f7583658c8ae909276a3e7b8f1) by @Lruihao

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Lruihao/vue-route-bridge/compare/v0.1.0...v0.2.0
